subcategories.Blades:
Using Blades
Make a melee attack using Blades + Agility [Accuracy] opposed by the defender's Reaction + Intuition. Add net hits to the weapon's Damage Value.

Reach
Compare the Reach of both combatants. The difference modifies the defender's dice pool: a longer Reach gives the defender a bonus when defending and imposes a penalty when defending against the combatant with greater Reach.

Damage
Use the Damage Value and Armor Penetration listed for the weapon.
subcategories.Clubs:
Using Clubs
Make a melee attack using Clubs + Agility [Accuracy] opposed by the defender's Reaction + Intuition. Add net hits to the weapon's Damage Value.

Reach
Compare the Reach of both combatants. The difference modifies the defender's dice pool.

Damage
Most clubs inflict damage based on Strength. Stun batons instead inflict Electricity damage using their listed Damage Value and AP.
subcategories.Other:
Other Melee Weapons
This category contains weapons that use different skills and special rules. Use the skill listed on the individual weapon.
  • Knucks: Use Unarmed Combat and the Physical limit.
  • Monofilament Whip: Use Exotic Melee Weapon (Monofilament Whip).
  • Shock Gloves: Use Unarmed Combat and resolve their damage as Electricity damage.
Standard melee attack, Reach, defense, and damage rules otherwise apply.
subcategories.Bows:
Using Bows
Use Archery + Agility [Accuracy]. Reloading a bow requires a Ready Weapon Simple Action.

Strength Requirement
A bow's Rating is its minimum Strength requirement. For every point that the user's Strength is below the bow's Rating, apply a −3 dice pool modifier.

Range and Damage
Use the lowest of the character's Strength, the bow's Rating, or the arrow's Rating when determining range and damage. Maximum bow Rating is 10.
subcategories.Crossbows:
Using Crossbows
Use Archery + Agility [Accuracy] and the normal ranged combat rules.

Reloading
Modern crossbows automatically reload and therefore do not require a Ready Weapon action between shots. Core Rulebook crossbows use internal magazines holding up to 4 bolts.
subcategories.Throwing Weapons:
Using Throwing Weapons
Use Throwing Weapons + Agility [Physical] and apply the normal ranged combat rules. Net hits increase the attack's Damage Value.

Readying Weapons
A character can ready a number of throwing knives or shuriken equal to Agility ÷ 2 with a single Ready Weapon action.

Thrown grenades use separate grenade rules.
subcategories.Tasers:
Using Tasers
Use Pistols + Agility [Accuracy] and the normal ranged combat rules. Tasers inflict Electricity damage.

Electricity Effects
If the target suffers at least 1 box of damage, they immediately suffer −5 Initiative Score and a −1 dice pool modifier to all actions and Defense Tests for 1 Combat Turn. Further damaging Electricity attacks do not increase these penalties, but each extends the −1 penalty's duration by 1 additional Combat Turn.
subcategories.Hold-Outs:
Using Hold-Out Pistols
Use Pistols + Agility [Accuracy] opposed by the target's Defense Test. Net hits increase Damage Value.

Use the weapon's listed Accuracy, Damage, AP, firing mode, recoil compensation, ammunition capacity, and the range bands for hold-out pistols. This subcategory has no additional universal combat rule beyond the normal firearm rules.
subcategories.Light Pistols:
Using Light Pistols
Use Pistols + Agility [Accuracy] opposed by the target's Defense Test. Net hits increase Damage Value.

Use the weapon's listed firing modes and apply the normal recoil and firearm rules. Range is determined using the light-pistol range bands.
subcategories.Heavy Pistols:
Using Heavy Pistols
Use Pistols + Agility [Accuracy] opposed by the target's Defense Test. Net hits increase Damage Value.

Use the weapon's listed firing modes and apply the normal recoil and firearm rules. Range is determined using the heavy-pistol range bands.
subcategories.Machine Pistols:
Using Machine Pistols
Use Automatics + Agility [Accuracy] opposed by the target's Defense Test.

Automatic Fire
Apply the rules for each firing mode available to the weapon. Burst Fire and Semi-Automatic Bursts impose −2 Defense; Long Bursts and Simple-Action Full Auto impose −5 Defense; Complex-Action Full Auto imposes −9 Defense. Apply recoil normally.
subcategories.Submachine Guns:
Using Submachine Guns
Use Automatics + Agility [Accuracy] opposed by the target's Defense Test.

Automatic Fire
Apply the rules for the firing modes available to the weapon. Burst Fire and Semi-Automatic Bursts impose −2 Defense; Long Bursts and Simple-Action Full Auto impose −5 Defense; Complex-Action Full Auto imposes −9 Defense. Apply recoil normally.
subcategories.Assault Rifles:
Using Assault Rifles
Use Automatics + Agility [Accuracy] opposed by the target's Defense Test.

Automatic Fire
Apply the rules for the firing modes available to the weapon. Burst Fire and Semi-Automatic Bursts impose −2 Defense; Long Bursts and Simple-Action Full Auto impose −5 Defense; Complex-Action Full Auto imposes −9 Defense. Apply recoil normally.
subcategories.Sniper Rifles:
Using Sniper Rifles
Use Longarms + Agility [Accuracy] opposed by the target's Defense Test. Net hits increase Damage Value.

Use the weapon's listed firing modes and normal recoil rules. Range is determined using the sporting-rifle or sniper-rifle range bands applicable to the individual weapon.
subcategories.Shotguns:
Using Shotguns
Use Longarms + Agility [Accuracy]. Shotguns normally fire slugs using their listed statistics. Shot rounds use the flechette ammunition rules and may use choke settings.

Changing Choke
Changing choke is a Simple Action, or a Free Action with a smartlinked shotgun.
  • Narrow: Target suffers −1 Defense at all ranges.
  • Medium: Targets suffer −3 Defense. Short: −1 DV, up to 2 targets in 2m. Medium: −3 DV, up to 3 targets in 4m. Long: −5 DV and −1 Accuracy, up to 4 targets in 6m. Extreme: −7 DV and −1 Accuracy, up to 6 targets in 8m.
  • Wide: Targets suffer −5 Defense. Short: −3 DV, up to 2 targets in 3m. Medium: −5 DV, up to 3 targets in 6m. Long: −7 DV and −1 Accuracy, up to 4 targets in 9m. Extreme: −9 DV and −1 Accuracy, up to 6 targets in 12m.
Medium and wide spreads cannot be used with Called Shots.
subcategories.Special Weapons:
Special Weapons
This subcategory contains weapons whose effects vary significantly. Use Exotic Ranged Weapon + Agility [Accuracy] unless the individual weapon states otherwise.

Resolve the weapon's effect according to its own description. Chemical weapons deliver their loaded chemical or toxin, dart weapons deliver their drug or toxin payload, and other devices use their individually listed special effects.
subcategories.Machine Guns:
Using Machine Guns
Use Heavy Weapons + Agility [Accuracy]. Machine guns are divided into light, medium, and heavy types, which determine their range bands.

Recoil
Machine guns suffer double the normal dice pool modifier for uncompensated recoil.

Medium and heavy machine guns are particularly large; the Core Rulebook suggests Strength 8+ to carry an MMG and Strength 10+ to carry an HMG, with vehicle mounting generally being more practical.
subcategories.Cannons/Launchers:
Using Cannons and Launchers
Use Heavy Weapons + Agility [Accuracy]. Assault cannons, grenade launchers, and missile launchers suffer double the normal dice pool modifier for uncompensated recoil.

Explosive Projectiles
For a launched grenade, rocket, or missile, make a Heavy Weapons + Agility [Accuracy] (3) Test. Success places the projectile at the intended point; failure causes scatter. Then resolve the projectile's explosion and blast effects.
subcategories.Grenades:
Throwing Grenades
Choose a location and make a Throwing Weapons + Agility [Physical] (3) Test using a Throw Weapon Simple Action. With 3 hits, the grenade lands at the intended point. Fewer than 3 hits causes scatter.

Detonation
  • Timer: Detonates during the next Combat Turn at the thrower's Initiative Score when thrown, minus 10.
  • Motion Sensor/Impact: Detonates following a sudden stop or change in direction, subject to the special miss and scatter rules.
  • Wireless: A character with appropriate access to the grenade can remotely detonate it.
Blast
Apply the grenade's listed Damage Value and AP at the centre of the explosion. For weapons with a negative Blast value such as −1/m or −2/m, reduce DV by that amount for every metre from the blast centre. Fixed-radius grenades instead affect the listed area.
subcategories.Rockets:
Firing Rockets
Make a Heavy Weapons + Agility [Accuracy] (3) Test, modified for range and other conditions. Success places the rocket at the intended point; failure causes scatter. Then resolve its explosion using the listed Damage Value, AP, and Blast.

Arming Distance
Rockets and missiles normally arm after travelling 10 metres from their point of origin and explode on impact. The safety feature can be disabled with an Armorer + Logic [Mental] (4, 5 Minutes) Extended Test.

Fragmentation, high-explosive, and anti-vehicle rockets use their individual warhead statistics.
subcategories.Missiles:
Firing Missiles
Missiles are rockets fitted with internal guidance systems. Use the launched explosive rules: make a Heavy Weapons + Agility [Accuracy] (3) Test, determine whether the projectile lands on target or scatters, then resolve the explosion.

Warhead
A missile uses the Damage Value, AP, and Blast of its chosen rocket warhead. Its guidance system increases its cost and may provide additional targeting capabilities where the relevant sensor rules are used.

Arming Distance
Missiles normally arm after travelling 10 metres and explode on impact.
subcategories.Exotic Melee Weapons:
Using Exotic Melee Weapons
Use Agility + the appropriate Exotic Melee Weapon skill [Accuracy]. Each unusual weapon is its own Exotic Melee Weapon specialization and may have additional handling rules. Standard melee defense, Reach, and damage rules otherwise apply.
subcategories.Improvised Weapons:
Using Improvised Weapons
Everyday objects may be pressed into service as melee weapons. Use the listed Accuracy, Reach, Damage Value, and AP, with the gamemaster selecting the most appropriate melee skill for the object and attack. Improvised weapons may break, deform, or change statistics as circumstances dictate.
subcategories.Projectile Weapons:
Using Projectile Weapons
This group contains muscle-powered or mechanically launched ranged weapons such as harpoon guns, pistol crossbows, and slingshots. Use the listed weapon skill and normal ranged-combat procedure unless the weapon description states otherwise.
subcategories.Exotic Ranged Weapons:
Using Exotic Ranged Weapons
Each weapon uses an appropriate Exotic Ranged Weapon specialization unless its entry specifies another skill. These weapons frequently have unique targeting, damage, ammunition, entangling, or toxin-delivery rules, so resolve their listed special effects in addition to the normal ranged attack.
subcategories.Laser Weapons:
Using Laser Weapons
Use Exotic Ranged Weapon (Laser Weapons) + Agility [Accuracy]. Laser weapons generate no recoil. Their Damage Value is reduced by 1 for each range category beyond Short, and airborne particles or other visibility interference can further reduce damage. They may accept top- and underbarrel accessories but cannot otherwise be modified.
subcategories.Flamethrowers:
Using Flamethrowers
Use Exotic Ranged Weapon (Flamethrowers) + Agility [Accuracy]. Flamethrowers inflict Fire damage and can ignite targets or surroundings. They use taser range bands, suffer no modifier at Long range and only −1 at Extreme range, and may spread an attack across nearby targets by reducing Damage Value.

combat_axe.description: A two-handed tungsten-alloy monster, available single- or double-bladed. A hardened thrusting point can be concealed, spring-loaded, in the handle. While it may seem barbaric or primitive, the physical augmentations of 2075 can make an old-school weapon like a combat axe even deadlier than a firearm in the right hands. So go ahead, go medieval.

combat_knife.description: A long, KA-BAR-style fighting knife with a blacked-out blade and a chisel point for punching through armor.

forearm_snap_blades.description: These are essentially like spurs, only they’re external—painless to install or remove. A forearm sheath conceals three blades that can be extended or retracted via wireless link or muscle movement commands.
features: Wireless: ready as a Free Action.

katana.description: The legendary two-handed sword of the samurai. The katana has become synonymous not just with street samurai, but with shadowrunners in general, at least in the trids; they’ve got everyone packing a katana, from the decker to the mage. But being a silly cliché doesn’t make this blade any less dangerous, or less helpful in a fight.

knife.description: Your basic, all-purpose street cutter. It comes in a bewildering array of styles, colors, and flavors, but the statistics don’t vary from one to the next. Ordinary knives are used by the poor, the desperate, or the cautious as backup weapons.

pole_arm.description: This is, at its very essence, a blade on the end of a very long stick. It usually features an axe-head, glaive, spear point, or similar maiming implement. It’s not easy to handle and it’s just about impossible to conceal, but it’s popular both with trolls and with melee combatants looking to safely keep said large trolls at more than arm’s length.

survival_knife.description: A fine quality blade—smooth on one edge, serrated on the other—with several accessories, including a GPS monitor, mini-multitool, micro-lighter, and a hidden compartment in the handle. The sides of the steel are coated with a non-toxic chemical that blacks out the blade when inert to prevent unwanted reflection, but can be activated to provide two hours of phosphorescent light. All knives can cut flesh, but a survival knife is better at cutting rope and wood, or otherwise being used as a tool. The survival knife is the kind of gadget that no professional should be without.

sword.description: It’s sharp, it’s heavy, and it will fragging cut you wide open. Available in a wide variety of styles (wakizashi, seax, scimitar, jian, machete, and so on and so forth), this one-handed blade is not as formidable as a katana but is substantially easier to hide.

club.description: The weapon they named the skill after. These stats represent a range of objects, including an axe handle, baseball bat, wrench, crowbar, a tire iron, and a two-by-four with a rusty nail in it. There is a price listed, but it’s not overly difficult to find one for free if you know where to look.

extendable_baton.description: This telescoping club can be collapsed, and it can be extended with a sharp flick of the wrist or a wireless signal. When retracted, it’s more easily concealed (Concealability Modifier 0 when retracted, +2 when extended).
features: Wireless: ready as a Free Action.

sap.description: Also called a blackjack, this is a small, springy club, or a flat piece of iron in a flexible leather covering. It’s specially designed for concealment (Concealability Modifier –2).

staff.description: This large, heavy stick is popular with magicians going for that traditional look. Available in composite, hardwood, high-carbon steel, and other materials.

stun_baton.description: A standard riot-control weapon, viewed as a tool and symbol of corporate-government oppressors but pragmatically useful to runners. It has ten charges and regains one charge per ten seconds when plugged in.

telescoping_staff.description: This is a metal and composite staff that can telescope down to a reasonable size, one that can be concealed about as easily as a stun baton or a sword. It can be extended and locked in place by whirling it at the correct speed and angle and twisting the grip, or via a wireless signal.
features: Wireless: ready as a Free Action.

knucks.description: These may be traditional fist-load weapons like brass knuckles, or modern “Hardliner gloves” with a thin layer of densiplast located along the knuckles and the edge of the hand. Either way they substantially boost the impact of a punch, making it potentially deadly. Attacks with knucks use the Unarmed Combat skill.

monofilament_whip.description: Iconic. Terrifying. Deadly. Few weapons on the street are more feared. This monofilament line can cut through bone and armor like hot butter. The line extends out to two meters, and retracts into the weapon’s handle when not in use. The whip action, the weighted tip, and the deadly thread of the monofilament line itself make this weapon a potential danger to it’s wielder. On a glitch, you catch the weighted tip on something nearby and need to disentangle it before you make another proper attack with it. On a critical glitch, you hit yourself with the whip and take its base damage (resisted normally). A monofilament whip requires the Exotic Melee Weapon (Monofilament Whip) skill to use.
features: Wireless increases Accuracy to 7 and allows the whip to be readied as a Free Action.

shock_gloves.description: These electrically insulated gloves have a wire mesh that discharges electric current with a punch or a simple touch. The gloves deal electricity damage and are good for ten charges before they need to be plugged in and recharged (at a rate of one charge per ten seconds). Attacks with shock gloves use the Unarmed Combat skill.

bow.description: This could be a traditional longbow of fiberglass or wood, or possibly a modern compound-and-pulley bow. Both are archaic and rare weapons on the streets of 2075, and both have the advantage of being hacker-proof. Reloading a bow takes a Simple Action (Ready Weapon). Bows have ratings that indicate the minimum Strength you need to use that weapon. When attacking with a bow, a character whose Strength is less than the Strength minimum suffers a –3 dice pool modifier per point below the minimum; this penalty reflects the difficulty they have in pulling the bow and nocking an arrow. The weapon’s Rating is also used to determine its range and damage (maximum Rating is 10). Use the lowest value of your Strength, the bow’s rating, or the arrow Rating for range and damage when attacking a target, because your average Rating 10 titanium-sheathed beryllium-alloy bow tends to turn wood or fiberglass arrows into powder when they hit a target.

light_crossbow.description: Modern crossbows are equipped with automatic reloading devices, so unless you’re using a museum piece, reloading doesn’t require a Ready Weapon action. Crossbows have internal magazines (m) holding up to 4 bolts. Crossbows are available in Light, Medium, and Heavy sizes.

medium_crossbow.description: Modern crossbows are equipped with automatic reloading devices, so unless you’re using a museum piece, reloading doesn’t require a Ready Weapon action. Crossbows have internal magazines (m) holding up to 4 bolts. Crossbows are available in Light, Medium, and Heavy sizes.

heavy_crossbow.description: Modern crossbows are equipped with automatic reloading devices, so unless you’re using a museum piece, reloading doesn’t require a Ready Weapon action. Crossbows have internal magazines (m) holding up to 4 bolts. Crossbows are available in Light, Medium, and Heavy sizes.

throwing_knife_shuriken.description: A wide variety of shapes and sizes of aerodynamically balanced, specially weighted, muscle-powered throwing weapons are available, from throwing spikes to darts to kunai and shuriken. A character can ready (Agility ÷ 2) of these knives with one Ready Weapon action.

defiance_ex_shocker.description: This heavy-duty taser fires up to 4 darts that trail wires up to 20 meters long. The wired connection to the battery allows for a more powerful shock. Most modern tasers use wireless darts, so the Defiance EX Shocker is an exception. It also features contacts that allow it to be used as a stun weapon in melee (Accuracy 3, DV 8S(e), Reach 0).

yamaha_pulsar.description: The darts of this taser contain wireless capacitors, meaning that the Pulsar eliminates the need for cumbersome wires. As a trade-off, it is slightly less powerful than the EX Shocker, although it can fire faster. It lacks the EX Shocker’s melee contacts.

fichetti_tiffani_needler.description: Designed to appeal to social climbers and debutantes, the Tiffani Needler is available in a wide variety of colors and styles. It also has a special color-changing coating that can be manipulated via wireless signal. This is useful to make sure your gun matches with your shoes or your handbag. The Needler can only fire flechette rounds (already factored into its damage code).

streetline_special.description: Popular among society’s dregs, the Streetline Special is a small, lightweight weapon made of composite materials. Magnetic Anomaly Detectors (see MAD Scanner) suffer a –2 dice pool modifier to detect it.

walther_palm_pistol.description: This is a classic double-barreled derringer in an over-under barrel combination. It packs a punch for its size, but on the downside it has one of the most diminutive “magazine” capacities on the market—just one bullet per barrel. Both barrels can be fired at once as a short burst).

ares_light_fire_75.description: Designed based on one of the most common pistols on the market, the Light Fire is a weapon for special operators, not commonly available through legal channels. A special barrel-mounted silencer developed exclusively for the Light Fire comes attached, applying an additional –1 dice pool modifier to the modifier usually provided by silencers. In addition to its integral silencer, the Ares Light Fire 75 includes a smartgun system.

ares_light_fire_70.description: The Ares Light Fire 70 is one of the most common pistols on the market. A special barrel-mounted silencer developed exclusively for the Light Fire 70 is available that gives you an additional –1 dice pool modifier to the usual –4 (for a total of –5); this silencer costs 750¥.

beretta_201t.description: This light sidearm is used by many security professionals. It is capable of burst fire. Since the 201T is classified as a light pistol without further limitations, it is quite popular with security agencies in countries where heavy pistols and machine pistols are hard to come by legally. Semi-automatic bursts using the Beretta 201T require a Simple Action. The weapon includes a detachable shoulder stock.

colt_america_l36.description: A venerable pistol with a great reputation. This basic firearm is cheap, easily concealed, and nearly ubiquitous. A perfect throwaway weapon.

fichetti_security_600.description: A light sidearm for security forces, this weapon’s highly efficient feeding mechanism allows it a thirty-round magazine. The Fichetti Security 600 comes with a detachable folding stock and laser sight.

taurus_omni_6.description: This reliable, rugged revolver is specially designed to handle a wide variety of ammunition. Popular with hobbyists and hand-loaders, the Omni-6 comes with some interchangeable cylinders so it can take either cased or caseless, light pistol or heavy pistol ammo. When firing light pistol rounds, the Omni-6 is semi-automatic (SA) and has a base DV of 6P, and when it fires heavy pistol ammo it has only single shot mode (SS), and a base DV of 7P and –1 AP. The Omni-6 includes an integral laser sight.

ares_predator_v.description: The newest iteration of the most popular handgun in the world, especially with mercenaries and shadowrunners. Upgraded with improved ergonomics and handling features, the Ares Predator V includes a smartgun system. Some say that the Ares Predator V isn’t better than other guns in its class, but no one can argue that it has better brand recognition.

ares_viper_slivergun.description: The sleek Slivergun pairs the undeniably winning combo of burst-fire capability and built-in sound suppression (an integral silencer) with its large magazine capacity. It fires metal slivers that count as flechette ammunition, which is factored into the weapon’s damage code.

browning_ultra_power.description: This venerable sidearm is the Ares Predator’s primary competition as the world’s toughest heavy pistol. It offers a built-in top-mounted laser sight and is slightly cheaper.

colt_government_2066.description: This government-issue weapon, styled after the legendary Colt M1911a1, uses an electrically induced spark to detonate the bullet’s propellants. The removal of most moving parts from the firing mechanism gives this weapon a reputation for being exceptionally reliable.

remington_roomsweeper.description: This is really more of a short-barreled shotgun than a pistol. When loaded with shot rounds (flechette) rather than solid slugs, it uses Heavy Pistol ranges but shotgun rules.
features: With flechettes: 9P(f), AP +4.

ruger_super_warhawk.description: This revolver is as loud as a jet liner and twice as shiny. It’s also one of the scariest handguns in the world. The cased ammo variant is popular for the sheer thrill of swinging open the cylinder gate one handed and dumping spent brass.

ares_crusader_ii.description: A large magazine and easy handling make the Ares Crusader II one of the most popular weapons of its class. It features an integral barrel-mounted gas-vent 2 recoil compensation system and comes with an integral smartgun system.

ceska_black_scorpion.description: This classic machine pistol provides concealable burst-fire capability. It comes equipped with an integral folding stock.

steyr_tmp.description: This lightweight polymer-frame pistol is capable of full autofire, but its light weight makes it hard to control when firing on full auto. It comes equipped with a built-in top-mounted laser sight.

colt_cobra_tz_120.description: With its unique design and wide range of accessories, the Colt Cobra series is quite popular both among security forces the world over and on the trids. The TZ–120 comes with a folding stock, top-mounted laser sight, and a barrel-mounted gas-vent 2 system.

fn_p93_praetor.description: This bullpup submachine gun was purpose-built for Corporate Court-controlled Interpol fast-response teams. Its special chamber system provides 1 point of Recoil Compensation, it has an integrated rigid stock, and a flashlight that can be used to reduce darkness penalties by one step (Environmental Modifiers, p. 173). Possession of the FN P93 while not a legitimate member of a Corporate Court force is a crime in most jurisdictions.

hk_227.description: The SMG of choice for many corporate and military security forces, the HK–227 boasts a retractable stock, smartgun system, and integral sound suppressor.

ingram_smartgun_x.description: Grade-A bang bang. Famous as the weapon of choice for many legendary street samurai since the 2050s, the Ingram Smartgun comes tricked out with a gas-vent 2 system, a smartgun system, and an integral sound suppressor.

sck_model_100.description: Shin Chou Kyogo is synonymous with Japanese corporate security. Nearly every Japanacorp’s security forces are issued the SCK 100, including Renraku’s infamous Red Samurai. The SCK 100 features an internal smartgun system and a folding stock.

uzi_iv.description: This aging submachine gun is a worthy descendant of the famous Israeli weapon. The SMG features an integral folding stock and built-in top-mounted laser sight.

ak_97.description: The AK-97 is a legendary weapon with storied reliability—you can bury it for ten years, dig it up, and fire it immediately without a single problem. When all of the nano-fabricated AK–174s melted to slag, the AK-97s kept functioning just fine.

ares_alpha.description: Specially designed for Ares Firewatch special forces, the Alpha has since become a multi-platinum best-selling success the world over, seeing use with UCAS Special Forces. In part, this is due to its exceptional brand awareness, and also because of its underbarrel grenade launcher, smartgun system, and an expensive chamber design that provides 2 points of Recoil Compensation.
features: Integral grenade launcher: Accuracy 4 (6), SS, 6 (c).

colt_m23.description: This cheap, mass-produced, no-frills assault rifle is loved both by the gangbangers and pirates who can manage to get their hands on one and by the pros who are looking for something to modify from the ground up.

fn_har.description: This assault rifle is supremely popular with private security forces and corporate threat-response teams. It features a laser sight and a gas-vent 2 system.

yamaha_raiden.description: This electronic-firing assault rifle is state-of-the-art. The Raiden is very accurate and is quickly being adopted by japanacorp security forces and the Japanese Imperial Marines. It features an integral sound suppressor and smartgun system, and the electronic firing mechanism and design provides 1 point of Recoil Compensation.

ares_desert_strike.description: This combat-hardened sniper rifle is intended for long-range shooting in harsh environments. That means it was built without materials or technologies prone to failure. It comes equipped with a rigid stock with shock pad and a detachable imaging scope.

cavalier_arms_crockett_ebr.description: Straddling the line between assault rifle and sniper rifle, the Crockett EBR features a burst fire mode. While it lacks the magazine capacity of a true assault rifle, and lacks the precision of a true marksman’s weapon, it makes up for this in versatility, being able to switch fluidly between a sniping role and a combat role as easy as flipping a switch. It comes equipped with a rigid stock with shock pad and a detachable imaging scope.

ranger_arms_sm_5.description: A legendary assassin’s weapon, this sniper rifle features a silencer, an imaging scope, and a rigid stock with shock pad. The SM–5 disassembles completely in order to fit into a standard briefcase; setting it up or breaking it down takes an Extended Firearms + Logic [Mental] (6, Complex Action) Test. While deadly, the SM–5 is fragile. At the end of every Combat Turn in which the weapon is used in a running firefight, reduce its Accuracy by 1 (to a minimum of 3). If the weapon is used in combat as a melee weapon or to defend from a melee attack, reduce its Accuracy by 2 (again to a minimum of 3). Recalibrating the weapon (a one-hour job) returns its Accuracy to normal.

remington_950.description: This high-powered bolt-action hunting rifle features classic wooden furniture and a top-mounted imaging scope that have kept it popular with hunters for several decades. It cannot mount underbarrel accessories.

ruger_100.description: This futuristic-looking gas-operated sporting rifle is the favorite weapon for many professional hunters and hobbyists. It features a built-in imaging scope and a rigid stock with shock pad.

defiance_t_250.description: A common sight on the mean streets when things escalate beyond pistols and knives, this semi-automatic shotgun is available in either a normal-length or short-barreled version. It is gas operated, but also features a secondary pump action for situations where preventing jams is more important than quickly firing a second shot. The short-barreled version has the Concealability of +4, the range of a heavy pistol, and a damage code of 9P.

enfield_as_7.description: This military assault shotgun provides its user with massive firepower. As a close-quarters weapon and general combat gun, it is universally feared. It can either be loaded with ten-round ammo clips or a special twenty-four-round drum. The Enfield AS-7 comes equipped with a built-in, top-mounted laser sight.

pjss_model_55.description: This is a weapon of classic style for a classic sport. Produced only in small numbers, it’s renowned among European hunters and trap shooters as a precise and prestigious weapon. The weapon’s rigid stock comes equipped with an integrated shock pad. Both barrels can be shot at once as a short burst.

ares_s_iii_super_squirt.description: This popular non-lethal weapon fires DMSO gel packs. The dimethyl sulfoxide forces the skin to absorb the chemicals the operator wishes to deliver. The attack itself causes no damage, but when the target is hit successfully, the DMSO delivers the substance directly into the target’s bloodstream as a Contact vector toxin (Toxins, Drugs, and BTLs). The Super Squirt uses Light Pistol ranges and can accept top- and underbarrel-mounted accessories.

fichetti_pain_inducer.description: For a non-lethal weapon, the Fichetti Pain Inducer is not very humane. It makes someone feel like they are in a microwave, roasting from the inside out. Treat this as a toxin attack with a Power of 8 and a speed of Immediate. The target resists with Body + Willpower. If the modified Power exceeds the target’s Mental limit, the target must spend his next Action Phase doing whatever it takes to run away from the pain. The attacker can continue to hold her beam on a target with a Complex Action unless the gamemaster deems the target has dodged away or found cover. If the target cannot get out of the beam, he is incapacitated with pain, suffering a dice pool modifier equal to the modified Power on all tests for as long as the beam is trained on him. The Pain Inducer uses SMG ranges and can take top and underbarrel accessories. It has ten charges; when attached to a power point, it reloads one charge every ten seconds.

parashield_dart_pistol.description: The industry standard dart pistol, this fires injection darts with narcoject or another payload. The Parashield dart pistol uses Heavy Pistol ranges and can take top-mounted accessories.

parashield_dart_rifle.description: Originally designed to non-lethally take down large game animals at long ranges, the Parashield dart rifle uses compressed air cartridges to fire injection darts. This weapon includes a top-mounted imaging scope. It uses sporting rifle ranges and can mount top and underbarrel accessories.

ingram_valiant.description: This legendary light machine gun is popular with mercenary units the world over. It comes with a rigid stock with shock pad, a laser sight, and a barrel-mounted gas-vent 2 system.

stoner_ares_m202.description: This MMG packs a tremendous punch into a relatively lightweight framework made of extra-durable compounds. Due to its relatively small size, it’s a very popular secondary weapon for heavy military vehicles. Trolls with no concept of subtlety sometimes deck them out with accessories for use as personal weapons.

rpk_hmg.description: This heavy Russian machine gun is used by the militaries of several eastern European and Near East countries, primarily as a vehicle-mounted support weapon. Equipped with a detachable tripod, the RPK is usually fired from a prone, sitting, or kneeling position when not mounted on a vehicle.

ares_antioch_2.description: The Antioch–2 features a classic grenade launcher design combined with an integral smartlink system. It is one of the more affordable grenade launchers on the market.

armtech_mgl_12.description: This bullpup-configuration grenade launcher is popular, since it can fire in semi-auto mode and carries substantially more minigrenades than its competitors.

aztechnology_striker.description: The Striker is an extremely light disposable launcher—perfect when you want to deliver a punch and make a quick, unencumbered getaway.

krime_cannon.description: Krime may be a small-time manufacturer, but their assault cannon, simply called the Cannon, is a cheap heavy weapon big on attitude and firepower. It comes standard with modification for trolls, and so is the first weapon in the Sixth World to be intended for larger customers.

onotari_interceptor.description: This Saeder-Krupp-developed military missile launcher is designed to fire rockets or guided missiles, of any type. It has two separate barrels and firing chambers, and can load up to two missiles at once, which need not be of the same type. Due to backblast issues, it is not capable of “giving ‘em both barrels.” It features an internal smartgun system.

panther_xxl.description: This huge fragging gun is an assault cannon that uses ammunition similar to the primary weapon in many small tanks. It comes with a built-in smartgun system.

flash_bang_grenade.description: Upon detonation, these “concussion” or “stun” grenades explode to create a bright, loud, shocking blast distributed equally over a radius of 10 meters.

flash_pak.description: Not a grenade per se, this is an electronic unit the size of a pack of cigarettes containing four quartz-halogen micro-flashes designed to fire in random strobing sequence to blind opponents. Anyone looking in the direction of a flash-pak receives a –4 dice pool penalty on attack tests due to the strobing (flare compensation goggles, glasses, etc. reduce this modifier to –2, while flare compensation in cybereyes or as a retinal modification reduces this modifier to –1). The flash-pak has 10 charges; when activated it uses one charge per Combat Turn. When plugged in, it recharges one charge every 10 seconds.

fragmentation_grenade.description: These classic killing devices are designed to spread a cloud of deadly shrapnel over a large area, seriously injuring soft targets.

high_explosive_grenade.description: These grenades are designed to deliver a large blast and concentrated hurt.

gas_grenade.description: Instead of exploding, the gas grenade releases a cloud of gas over an area with a radius of 10 meters. This is usually riot control/CS gas, but many other chemical or toxin payloads can be chosen (Toxins, Drugs, and BTLs). The cloud lasts for approximately 4 Combat Turns (less in windy areas, longer in confined areas with poor ventilation, at the gamemaster’s discretion).

smoke_grenade.description: Similar to the gas grenade, a smoke grenade releases a cloud of smoke over an area with a diameter of 10 meters. The cloud obscures vision, applying visibility modifiers for smoke to relevant tests. The cloud lasts for approximately 4 Combat Turns (less in windy areas, longer in confined areas with poor ventilation, at the gamemaster’s discretion).

thermal_smoke_grenade.description: Identical to a smoke grenade, except that the smoke contains hot particles designed to obscure thermographic vision. Apply the visibility modifiers for thermal smoke. The cloud lasts for approximately 4 Combat Turns (less in windy areas, longer in confined areas with poor ventilation, at the GM’s discretion).

anti_vehicle_rocket.description: AV rockets/missiles contain a shaped-charge warhead designed to burn or punch its way through a vehicle or barrier. Though the impact causes a blast, it is limited compared to that of a High-Explosive projectile. AV attacks have an AP of –10 against vehicles and barriers, –4 against other targets.

fragmentation_rocket.description: Used principally against people, the warhead discharges high-speed metal or plastic-metal fragments designed to tear into unprotected flesh. These rockets/missiles are very effective against unprotected individuals, but fairly ineffective against barriers, structures, and vehicles.

high_explosive_rocket.description: HE rockets/missiles are designed to do heavy damage to a large area. Their blast pattern is similar to that of a grenade, but much larger. They are not particularly effective against hardened targets, such as vehicles or protected military structures. HE weapons use the standard grenade rules for determining the blast and its effects.

guided_missile.description: Missiles are rockets that carry internal guidance systems, making them more expensive than standard “dumb” rockets. Rockets and missiles are set to arm when they have traveled 10 meters from their point of origin and explode on impact. This safety feature can be disabled with an Armorer + Logic [Mental] (4, 5 Minutes) Extended Test.

cougar_fineblade_long.description: The long version of Cougar's professionally crafted Fineblade line, currently styled after a gladius and intended as a high-quality fighting blade.

cougar_fineblade_short.description: The short version of Cougar's professionally crafted Fineblade line, currently styled after a Bowie knife and designed as a compact premium fighting blade.

highland_forge_claymore.description: An exceptionally large custom-forged two-handed claymore built for tremendous reach, damage, and armor penetration.
features: The standard scabbard requires a Complex Action to Ready Weapon.

horizon_flynn_rapier.description: A slender composite rapier created by Horizon and bladesmith Dante Flynn, emphasizing precision, flexibility, stability, and armor penetration.

ares_one_monosword.description: A modern street-samurai sword whose cutting edge incorporates monofilament material to improve penetration.

victorinox_memory_blade_sword.description: A sword-length SmartSteel weapon that can become flexible enough to disguise as clothing or another harmless object, then harden into a blade.
features: If both sheath and grip are concealed, detecting the weapon uses a −4 Concealability modifier.
Changing between flexible and hardened states requires a Complex Action, in addition to drawing or readying the weapon.
Changing the blade's programmed shape requires a Software + Logic [Mental] (8, 1 minute) Extended Test.

victorinox_memory_blade_dagger.description: The dagger-sized version of the Victorinox SmartSteel memory blade, capable of being disguised as clothing or another flexible object before hardening for use.
features: If both sheath and grip are concealed, detecting the weapon uses a −4 Concealability modifier.
Changing between flexible and hardened states requires a Complex Action, in addition to drawing or readying the weapon.
Changing the blade's programmed shape requires a Software + Logic [Mental] (8, 1 minute) Extended Test.

nemesis_arms_maul_stun_staff.description: A long stun staff combining staff-level Reach with a powerful electrical shock.

garrote.description: A flexible strangling weapon designed to be looped around a target's neck and used at close quarters.

ares_queen_of_hearts_monofilament_garrot.description: Ares' monofilament version of the garrote, capable of inflicting devastating physical injury and extreme armor penetration.

bullwhip.description: A long flexible whip offering substantial Reach but poor effectiveness against armor.

ash_arms_combat_chainsaw.description: A chainsaw deliberately engineered for combat rather than forestry, delivering fixed physical damage and strong armor penetration.

ash_arms_monofilament_chainsaw.description: A more dangerous Ash Arms combat chainsaw fitted with monofilament cutting surfaces for exceptional damage and armor penetration.

bottle_unbroken.description: An intact bottle used as an improvised club. After an appropriate damaging hit it may become a broken bottle.
features: Display name: Bottle (Unbroken)

bottle_broken.description: A broken bottle used as an improvised cutting or stabbing weapon.
features: Display name: Bottle (Broken, After First Hit)

chain_improvised.description: A length of chain used as an improvised flexible melee weapon with substantial Reach.
features: Display name: Chain

chair_improvised.description: An ordinary chair swung as a large improvised blunt weapon.
features: Display name: Chair

fork_improvised.description: An ordinary fork used as an improvised stabbing weapon; it performs poorly against armor.
features: Display name: Fork

frying_pan_improvised.description: A heavy frying pan used as an improvised striking weapon.
features: Display name: Frying Pan

hammer_improvised.description: A common hammer used as an improvised melee weapon; its AP can vary with how it is used.
features: Display name: Hammer

pistol_improvised_melee.description: A pistol used to strike an opponent rather than fire.
features: Display name: Pistol (Improvised Melee)

pool_cue_improvised.description: A pool cue used as an improvised thrusting or striking weapon.
features: Display name: Pool Cue

rifle_butt_improvised.description: The stock or butt of a rifle used for a heavy blunt strike.
features: Display name: Rifle Butt

sledge_hammer_improvised.description: A heavy two-handed sledge hammer used as an improvised melee weapon.
features: Display name: Sledge Hammer

aquadyn_shark_xs_harpoon_gun.description: A magazine-fed harpoon gun designed for underwater hunting and combat.

standard_harpoon_gun.description: A basic single-shot harpoon gun intended for aquatic hunting or combat.

ranger_sliver_pistol_crossbow.description: A highly accurate compact crossbow small enough to serve as a pistol-sized projectile weapon.

ares_giantslayer_slingshot.description: A modern high-accuracy slingshot suitable for launching small projectiles quietly and without electronics.

boomerang.description: An aerodynamic returning throwing weapon that uses Aerodynamic Grenade range bands.
features: A successful throw requires Throwing Weapons + Agility [Physical] (2).
Catching a returning boomerang requires Agility + Reaction (4).
A boomerang that hits a target does not return.

harpoon_javelin.description: A heavy thrown spear or harpoon designed to deliver high physical damage.
features: May also be used in melee with the Blades skill, using the same damage and Reach 2.

net.description: A thrown entangling net intended to restrain rather than directly injure a target.
features: A grazing hit can entangle the target and initiate a subduing-combat style restraint.
Escaping uses Agility + Unarmed Combat or Agility + Escape Artist against a threshold equal to the attacker's net hits.
Range is half Throwing Knife range, rounded up.

cavalier_arms_urban_tribe_tomahawk.description: A modern tomahawk optimized for accurate throwing while remaining effective as a hand weapon.

ares_screech_sonic_rifle.description: A sonic rifle that attacks with focused sound rather than conventional projectiles.
features: Uses shotgun-style spread settings and range handling.
Targets resist with Willpower instead of Body, and normal armor does not protect against the attack.
Audio dampers provide +2 dice to resist.
Consumes 1 power unit per shot and can cause disorientation and nausea.

blowgun.description: A simple, extremely accurate tube used to launch small darts, commonly carrying toxin payloads.
features: Delivering an injected toxin through armor requires an appropriate Called Shot to an unarmored location.
A critical glitch may cause the user to inhale their own dart.

bolas.description: Weighted cords thrown to strike and entangle a target, dealing Stun damage while being poor against armor.

nemesis_arms_suruchin_monofilament_bolas.description: A lethal monofilament version of bolas that can either strike as ordinary bolas or cut with monofilament for severe Physical damage and armor penetration.

fn_aal_gyrojet_pistol.description: A pistol firing small self-propelled gyrojet projectiles rather than conventional bullets.

mortimer_of_london_trafalger_gun_cane.description: A fashionable walking cane concealing a single-shot firearm.

knockoff_gun_cane.description: A cheaper imitation gun cane with more raw damage but less accuracy and refinement.

sa_retiarus_net_gun_basic.description: The standard SA Retiarus launcher, which fires nets to entangle targets at range.

sa_retiarus_net_gun_xl.description: The larger XL version of the SA Retiarus net gun, intended for bigger targets and using a smaller two-net capacity.

tiffani_elegance_shooting_bracers.description: Concealable firearm bracers disguised as fashionable accessories and fired from the wrist.

cavalier_safeguard.description: A compact semi-automatic taser with a six-dart magazine and improved accuracy when using its sighting system.

tiffani_defiance_protector.description: A fashionable compact taser designed for discreet personal protection.

fichetti_tiffani_self_defender_2075.description: A tiny four-shot hold-out pistol marketed as a fashionable personal-defense weapon.

fichetti_executive_action.description: A compact executive-defense light pistol capable of both semi-automatic and burst fire.

nitama_sporter.description: A lightweight, long-barreled light pistol designed for inexperienced or small-framed users, with low felt recoil and a built-in laser sight.

shiawase_arms_puzzler.description: A highly concealable modular pistol whose parts can be disguised among innocuous personal items and assembled into a functional firearm.
features: Recognizing the disparate components as a firearm and assembling the weapon use the special Puzzler rules.

cavalier_deputy.description: A seven-shot heavy revolver offering high accuracy at a modest price.

onotari_arms_violator.description: A semi-automatic heavy pistol with built-in recoil compensation and a ten-round clip.

psk_3_collapsible_heavy_pistol.description: A powerful heavy pistol engineered to collapse into a more concealable form for covert carriage.

savalette_guardian.description: A high-end heavy pistol combining strong damage, smartgun-assisted accuracy, recoil compensation, and burst-fire capability.

onotari_arms_equalizer.description: A compact automatic pistol capable of burst and full-auto fire.

ppsk_4_collapsible_machine_pistol.description: A concealable collapsible machine pistol with a large magazine and both semi-automatic and burst-fire modes.

ultimax_70.description: A controllable machine pistol built for burst and full-auto fire, with substantial integral recoil compensation.

ares_executioner.description: A compact Ares submachine gun offering all three common firing modes and smartgun-assisted accuracy.

hk_urban_combat.description: A premium close-quarters submachine gun with exceptional accuracy, strong damage, and excellent recoil control.

ak_98.description: An AK-pattern assault rifle fitted with an integral grenade launcher.
features: Integral grenade launcher: Accuracy 3, SS, 6 (m); damage and AP depend on the loaded grenade.

ares_hvar.description: Ares' hyper-velocity assault rifle, equipped with an integral smartlink, rigid stock with shock pad, and specialized recoil-reduction system.
features: Standard upgrades: shock pad and smartlink.
The barrel cannot support further additions.

hk_xm30.description: A modular H&K weapon system that can be rebuilt into assault-rifle, carbine, sniper, light-machine-gun, shotgun, or grenade-launcher configurations.
features: Standard upgrades: imaging scope, shock pad, and smartlink.
Refitting to another configuration requires an Automatics + Agility (5, 1 minute) Extended Test.
Carbine: Accuracy 6 (8), 9P, AP -2, SA/BF/FA, RC (1), 30 (c); uses SMG ranges.
Sniper: Accuracy 7 (9), 9P, AP -2, SA, RC 2 (3), 10 (c).
LMG: Accuracy 6 (8), 9P, AP -2, BF/FA, RC 2 (3), 100 (belt).
Shotgun: Accuracy 3 (5), 10P, AP -1, SA, RC (1), 10 (c).
Grenade launcher: Accuracy 4, SS, 6 (c); damage and AP depend on the loaded grenade.

nissan_optimum_ii.description: A versatile smartgun-equipped assault rifle with built-in recoil compensation and an integral underbarrel shotgun.
features: Integral shotgun: Accuracy 4 (6), 10P, AP -1, SA, RC 1, 5 (m).

barret_model_122.description: An extremely powerful semi-automatic anti-materiel sniper rifle with exceptional armor penetration.

onotari_arms_jp_k50.description: A high-capacity precision rifle capable of both semi-automatic and burst fire.

pioneer_60.description: An inexpensive single-shot sporting rifle suitable for hunting and basic long-range shooting.

terracotta_arms_am_47.description: A high-end semi-automatic sniper rifle combining devastating damage with excellent accuracy and recoil control.

auto_assault_16.description: A brutally powerful automatic shotgun capable of semi-automatic, burst, and full-auto fire.

franchi_spas_24.description: A modern combat shotgun offering smartgun-assisted accuracy and burst-fire capability.

mossberg_am_cmdt.description: A smartgun-equipped automatic combat shotgun capable of semi-automatic, burst, and full-auto fire.

remington_990.description: A straightforward semi-automatic shotgun with an eight-round clip.

ge_vindicator_mini_gun.description: A high-rate-of-fire minigun built to saturate an area with sustained automatic fire.

sa_nemesis.description: A smartgun-assisted light machine gun capable of burst and full-auto fire.

fn_mag_5.description: A powerful full-auto machine gun with heavy damage, strong penetration, and substantial recoil compensation in its supported configuration.

ultamax_mmg.description: A medium machine gun offering solid accuracy and strong recoil control when properly supported.

ruhrmetall_sf_20.description: A powerful full-auto machine gun combining heavy damage and excellent armor penetration.

ultamax_hmg_2.description: A heavy machine gun designed for sustained automatic fire with very strong recoil compensation.

ares_thunderstruck_gauss_rifle.description: A high-powered electromagnetic gauss rifle firing hypervelocity projectiles with exceptional accuracy and armor penetration.
features: Requires both ammunition and an energy supply.

ares_vigorous_assault_cannon.description: A heavy single-shot assault cannon delivering extreme physical damage and armor penetration.

mitsubishi_yakusoku_mrl.description: A multi-rocket launcher with paired launch tubes and the capacity to carry several different missile types.
features: Can hold up to four missile types, with two missiles in each tube.
An integrated wireless smartgun system can select the loaded missile type as a Free Action.
Firing both tubes can be handled by splitting the attack dice pool or by using a self-guided system in one tube.

ogre_hammer_sws_assault_cannon.description: A highly accurate semi-automatic assault cannon designed to deliver devastating heavy-caliber fire.

onotari_arms_ballista_mml.description: A four-missile launcher designed to fire a variety of rocket or missile warheads.

ares_redline.description: A highly accurate compact laser weapon with extreme armor penetration but relatively modest base damage.

ares_lancer_mp_laser.description: A more powerful man-portable laser weapon using paired internal power packs or an external power source.

ares_archon_heavy_mp_laser.description: A heavy man-portable laser weapon that trades portability for tremendous damage and armor penetration, requiring an external power source.

shiawase_blazer.description: A compact military flamethrower used by mercenary and special-operations forces.
features: Replacing the fuel tank requires a full Combat Turn.
Can attack one target or up to two additional targets within 2 meters, reducing DV by 2 for each additional target.
Uses taser range bands: no penalty at Long range and only −1 at Extreme range.
Suppressive fire consumes all 4 shots in the fuel tank.

Airburst Link.description: Connects a grenade launcher to a smartgun system so airburst timing can be calculated to reduce scatter and improve detonation placement.

Bipod.description: A folding support used from a stable firing position to provide recoil compensation.

Concealable Holster.description: A holster designed to hide a pistol more effectively beneath clothing.

Gas-Vent System.description: A barrel-mounted gas-vent system that provides recoil compensation equal to its Rating.

Gyro Mount.description: A wearable stabilization harness that provides substantial recoil compensation for heavy or automatic weapons.

Hidden Arm Slide.description: A spring-loaded forearm slide that conceals a small pistol and can rapidly place it in the user's hand.

Imaging Scope (Firearm Accessory).description: A top-mounted imaging device that can accept vision enhancements and can be used to aim without exposing the user's head.

Laser Sight.description: Projects an aiming point onto the target and improves Accuracy when the dot is visible and the sight is used properly.

Periscope (Firearm Accessory).description: A simple weapon-mounted periscope that allows observation and firing from behind cover with reduced exposure.

Quick-Draw Holster.description: A holster optimized for fast access, making it easier to quick-draw the weapon.

Shock Pad.description: A stock-mounted recoil pad that provides recoil compensation for shoulder-fired weapons.

Silencer/Suppressor.description: A barrel attachment that reduces the sound and muzzle flash of gunfire, making shots harder to detect.

Smart Firing Platform.description: An autonomous stabilized weapon platform that can mount and operate a firearm using its own sensor and targeting systems.

Smartgun System (Internal).description: An integrated smartgun system that links the weapon to compatible smartlink gear for enhanced targeting and weapon management.

Smartgun System (External).description: An external smartgun attachment that provides smartlink functionality to a compatible weapon.

Spare Clip.description: An empty spare ammunition clip sized for a compatible firearm.

Speed Loader.description: A device that quickly reloads a revolver or similar cylinder-fed weapon.

Tripod.description: A heavy three-legged support that provides strong recoil compensation when deployed on a stable surface.

Arrow.description: Standard ammunition for a bow. Its effective performance is limited by the arrow Rating as well as the bow and user.

Injection Arrow.description: A hollow arrow designed to inject a loaded drug or toxin into a target on a successful penetrating hit.

Injection Bolt.description: A hollow crossbow bolt that carries and injects a drug or toxin payload.

APDS.description: Armor-piercing discarding-sabot rounds designed to defeat armor; they reduce the target's effective protection substantially.

Assault Cannon Ammunition.description: Large-caliber ammunition used by assault cannons.

Explosive Rounds.description: Explosive ammunition that increases Damage Value and improves armor penetration.

Flechette Rounds.description: A cloud of small darts that increases base damage against unarmored targets but performs poorly against armor.

Gel Rounds.description: Non-lethal impact rounds that convert damage to Stun and can knock targets down.

Hollow Points.description: Expanding ammunition that increases damage against soft targets but is less effective against armor.

Injection Darts.description: Darts intended for compatible dart weapons; the effect is determined by the loaded drug or toxin.

Regular Ammunition.description: Standard firearm ammunition with no special damage or armor-piercing modifier.

Stick-n-Shock.description: Electrified ammunition that converts the attack to Electricity Stun damage with strong armor penetration.

Tracer Rounds.description: Visible tracer ammunition that helps track sustained automatic fire and can improve certain long bursts.

EX-Explosive Rounds.description: Enhanced explosive ammunition with a larger charge than standard explosive rounds, increasing Damage Value by 2 and improving Armor Penetration by 1.

Frangible.description: Rounds designed to break apart on hard surfaces. They are less effective against armor and barriers; barriers count double their normal Armor against frangible ammunition.

Flare.description: Signal ammunition that ignites when fired and bursts into burning sparks at 60 meters. The first modifiers apply below 60 meters; the second apply from 60 to 62 meters. The round is ineffective beyond 62 meters and may set a struck target on fire.

Tracker.description: A bullet containing an RFID tag. If the attack damages the target, the tag remains lodged in the body; if all damage is resisted, it lodges in the armor. Tracker rounds use either security or stealth RFID tags.

Capsule.description: Light rounds carrying a liquid payload. A successful hit, including a grazing hit, ruptures the capsule and exposes the target to the chemical inside. One chemical dose fills five rounds; filling each round requires a Logic + Armorer [Mental] (12, 1 minute) Extended Test. Capsule rounds always use Light Pistol ranges.

Barbed Head.description: A barbed arrowhead designed to cause additional injury when removed. Removing a barbed arrow without causing further damage requires a First Aid + Logic [Mental] (3) Test. On failure, the target suffers unresisted Physical damage equal to 3 minus the hits scored.

Explosive Head.description: A shaped explosive charge mounted on an arrowhead. It applies -1 Accuracy, +2 Damage Value, and -1 Armor Penetration to the arrow.

Hammerhead Arrowhead.description: A blunt arrowhead intended to incapacitate rather than puncture. It applies -1 Accuracy, changes the attack to Stun damage with a +1 DV modifier, and worsens Armor Penetration by 2.

Incendiary Head.description: A white-phosphorus arrowhead. On any successful hit, including a Grazing Hit, it erupts in fire for 8P damage with AP -6. The phosphorus then burns for 3 additional Combat Turns, causing 6P fire damage with AP -4 each turn and potentially igniting or damaging carried items. Wireless bonus: the head can detonate before impact and split between two targets within 1 meter of each other; each target defends separately, neither takes the initial 8P hit, and each instead suffers 6P with AP -4 for 4 Combat Turns including the current turn.

Screamer Head.description: A hollow signaling arrowhead designed to produce a chosen audible sound in flight. Resetting the sound requires a Simple Action and a Logic + Intuition (1) Test. Wireless bonus: changing the sound becomes a Free Action and can be done while the arrow is in flight.

Stick 'n' Shock Arrowhead.description: An electrical arrowhead that replaces the arrow's normal damage with 8S(e), AP -5, and applies -1 Accuracy. For its full electrical potential, it can be combined with a Static Shaft.

Static Shaft.description: An Ares arrow shaft filled with a powder that builds electrical charge during flight. It is designed to be combined with a Stick 'n' Shock arrowhead and adds +4S(e) to the attack's damage.

category.Weapon Support:
Weapon Support
Ammunition and accessories are stored with the weapon archive. Open any support record to see generally applicable weapons; open a weapon to review compatible support with effect and cost. Mounts, existing factory features and individual exceptions still apply.
